vocab.word: cost an arm and a leg
vocab.meaning: rất đắt đỏ, tốn kém rất nhiều tiền
vocab.example: I saw a handcrafted mirror in a boutique that I loved, but it would have cost an arm and a leg.

vocab.meaning: đầy đủ các tính năng hiện đại/phụ trợ (thường để làm vật đó hấp dẫn hơn)
vocab.example: I recently bought a smart mirror for my bathroom that has all the bells and whistles, including Bluetooth and a clock.

vocab.meaning: chi tiêu quá khả năng/làm khánh kiệt (thường dùng ở dạng phủ định)
vocab.example: I wanted a full-length mirror for my bedroom, but I made sure to find one that wouldn't break the bank.

vocab.meaning: đổ sông đổ biển, lãng phí (tiền bạc/công sức)
vocab.example: I once bought a cheap mirror online that arrived shattered; it felt like my money had gone straight down the drain.

vocab.meaning: sang trọng, đẳng cấp cao (phù hợp cho vua chúa)
vocab.example: The vintage mirror I found at the auction has a gold frame that looks fit for a king.

vocab.meaning: một món hời (mua được với giá rất rẻ so với giá trị thật)
vocab.example: I picked up a beautiful antique mirror at a garage sale for only ten dollars; it was an absolute steal.

vocab.meaning: bắt mắt, thu hút sự chú ý ngay lập tức
vocab.example: I bought a sunburst-shaped mirror because I wanted something eye-catching to hang above the fireplace.
Authentic Victorian mirrors at reasonable prices are few and far between these days.

vocab.meaning: lựa chọn kỹ lưỡng/có nhiều sự lựa chọn
vocab.example: When I was redecorating, I went to a large warehouse so I could pick and choose the perfect mirror for my hallway.

vocab.meaning: tình trạng rất tốt, hoàn hảo (hoặc rất hữu ích)
vocab.example: I've had this vanity mirror for a decade and it's still as good as gold, without a single scratch on the glass.
